title: Doppelganger fake Bild clone infrastructure
description: Curated Doppelganger case event for fake Bild clone sites used to distribute pro-Russian narratives about Ukraine, sanctions, energy costs, refugees and German politics. IOC values are attached separately from the narrative text.

title: Doppelganger fake Der Spiegel clone infrastructure
description: Curated Doppelganger case event for fake Der Spiegel clone sites in the same public infrastructure report. The event captures media impersonation and anti-Ukraine narratives while keeping operational domains in structured IOC fields.

title: Doppelganger fake T-Online clone infrastructure
description: Curated Doppelganger case event for fake T-Online clone sites reported by Qurium. The case demonstrates repeated typosquatted domains and shared DNS infrastructure around a German media target.

title: Doppelganger fake FAZ and Welt redirect infrastructure
description: Curated Doppelganger case event for fake FAZ and Welt clone sites. Qurium reported hidden hosting and geolocated redirect behavior for these clone domains and related article URLs.

title: Doppelganger Tagesspiegel to ND-Aktuell redirect path
description: Curated Doppelganger case event showing a geolocated redirect path from a fake Tagesspiegel article to a fake ND-Aktuell page. This event is included to exercise evidence-path visualization over real public IOC relations.

title: Doppelganger international media clone infrastructure
description: Curated Doppelganger case event for non-German media clone domains reported in the same public investigation, including UK, US, French, Italian, Baltic and Ukrainian media impersonation targets.
